sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missed features, and the recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to match the target JDK for the project.
sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17; the build tool needs to know the target source and compatibility level to compile correctly.

sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated MySQL Connector/J artifact with the new groupId and artifactId.
sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and removed in newer versions; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is required for compatibility with Spring Boot 3 and modern JDBC drivers.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments required by Spring Boot 3.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on Spring Boot 3 / Java 17+ environments.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+, causing compile errors due to missing packages.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in Spring Security HTTP configuration.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate formLogin configuration to use lambda DSL required by Spring Security 6.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The fluent setter methods on formLogin() are removed in Spring Security 6, causing a compile error.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate logout configuration to use lambda DSL required by Spring Security 6.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The fluent setter methods on logout() are removed in Spring Security 6, causing a compile error.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using the old import causes a compile error (cannot find symbol) or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.
